rationale: For an enterprise software managing ₹1 Lakh licenses, the tool must look extremely sophisticated, precise, and expensive. Linear/Vercel-inspired deep black/slate background with stark white text and highly specific neon/vibrant accents ensures readability and a premium 'command center' feel.

visual_enhancers.textures: Include a fixed fixed full-screen pseudo-element with a repeating radial-gradient noise or SVG noise pattern at 3% opacity. It removes the 'flat' digital look.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid var(--border_light). Use on cards, headers, table rows.
visual_enhancers.custom_cursor: Create a custom cursor in vanilla JS: A 4px white dot that instantly follows the mouse, and a 24px transparent circle with a 1px white border that follows with a slight 0.1s lag.

layout_grids.dashboard_overview: CSS Grid: grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem. Stat cards take 1fr each. The table spans all 4 columns.

motion.hover_states: Buttons: transition: all 0.2s ease; On hover: transform: translateY(-1px);
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for table rows using @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }. Apply with incrementing animation-delay.
motion.live_indicator: @keyframes pulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 var(--pulse-glow); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(50,215,75,0); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(50,215,75,0); } }

icons.style: Use regular or light weight. Size 16px to 20px max.

buttons.secondary: Pill shape, background: transparent, border: 1px solid #333, color: #FFF, hover background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1).
buttons.danger: Pill shape, background: rgba(255, 69, 58, 0.1), color: #FF453A, border: 1px solid rgba(255, 69, 58, 0.3).

cards.style: background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border_light); border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease;

table.header: color: var(--text_secondary); font-size: var(--overline); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding-bottom: 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
table.rows: border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border_light); transition: background 0.2s ease;
table.badges: padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 99px; font-family: var(--mono); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500. Colors map to status variables.

inputs.style: background: var(--surface_elevated); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; color: #FFF; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s;

login.layout: Centered Glassmorphic Panel on a dark dramatic background. The panel should be max-width 400px, with intense padding and tight typography.

dashboard.header: Fixed top bar. Contains Brand Logo (left) and Live Viewer Counter / Account Dropdown (right).
dashboard.stats_row: Total Licenses, Active, Expired, Revoked, Monthly Revenue.
dashboard.table_section: Title 'Customer Licenses'. Right-aligned 'Create License' primary button and search input. The table displays key, name, mill, plan, expiry, status, online indicator, actions.
dashboard.modals: Fixed fixed overlay (z-50) with glassmorphism backdrop. Modal box itself is var(--surface) with var(--border_light).

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, table rows) MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-license-btn', data-testid='login-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building this purely in HTML/CSS/JS without any frameworks or build tools (no React, no Tailwind).
Write all HTML into public/index.html. Include the Satoshi and JetBrains Mono CDNs in the <head>. Include the Phosphor icons script.
Write all CSS into public/styles.css. Use CSS variables (:root) heavily to enforce the exact color palette defined here.
Implement the custom cursor in public/app.js. Hide the default cursor with CSS (cursor: none) on the body.
Handle all UI interactions (modals, login toggle, table rendering) using vanilla JS DOM manipulation in public/app.js.
Implement the live online counter. Use a CSS animation for the green pulse dot. The number can be static or randomly fluctuating via JS.
When a new license is generated, show the 'License Key Success Modal' with the key huge in JetBrains Mono font, and a functioning 'Copy' button.
Design the login screen to look highly dramatic using the provided background_image URL, a dark overlay, and a glassmorphism form panel.
Do NOT use generic purple or blue gradients. Strictly stick to the 'Obsidian/Stark White' aesthetic with neon status indicators.
